task: Review risks and safeguards for a bounded operational degradation replay exercise. The exercise compares visible-only replay and pond-backed full-lineage replay under omitted ranges, stale authority, contradiction chains, retry divergence, runtime drift, and incomplete recovery traces. Do not validate public claims. Do not claim broad capability. Return only operational safeguards, replay-separation requirements, failure-mode cautions, and claim-boundary warnings.

context.summary: Neutral risk review only. This request does not ask for public claim validation, broad conclusions, impossible capability claims, or promotion. It only asks Inside Voice to identify operational degradation risks and safeguards before constructing a bounded local replay comparison.
constraints: surface risks without treating them as defects
compare visible-only replay and pond-backed full-lineage replay only within bounded local scenarios
preserve MCP-seasoned candidate status as not promoted
